entry.title: Re: 1GA scope item missed in initial scoping
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I'd like to ask you to check below SAP KBAs for further information:

3372903 - Scope item 1GA is not visible in scoping

3376794 - Scope item 2VA is not visible in scoping

3425018 - CBC: How to check whether a scope item is only available for initial scoping

 

Best regards,

Tamas

entry.title: Re: Testing SAP Build Process Automation task UI in SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
Hi @MioYasutake  Thanks for your development efforts, looks like a great solution!

I am, like many others, also struggling to get this wrapper running which is why I was wondering wether you could provide us with a sample project that gives us a hint about folder structure, path/namespace specifications etc.

From @Mark112358 's comments, I understood that we have to adjust the ui5.yaml as follows:

I can execute the wrapper with `npm run start-local` (without -local it's not working), however, when clicking "Show Task UI", the application also freezes due to an unfindable `Component.js` (/webapp/ path missing), same for the manifest.json also due to wrong path like below

Would appreciate your feedback!

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Business Partner - Initial HCM-Integration as Background Job
entry.content:
Introduction

You have technically converted your system to SAP S/4HANA and are about to activate the HCM-BP Integration based on the provided guidelines.

2340095 - S4TWL - Conversion of Employees to Business Partners

The transition to SAP S/4HANA necessitates the implementation of the employee business partner when HCM data (such as the HCM infotype-based PERNR data model, including PA-Tables) is required. This HCM data may be maintained locally (for instance, through transactions PA30 or PA40) or through integration scenarios with SAP HCM as a hub implementation, SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central, or an external HCM system.

One task involves running the migration report /SHCM/RH_SYNC_BUPA_FROM_EMPL. The blog explains how to execute this migration as a background task to utilize parallelization and acceleration.

For comprehensive details on the new HCM-BP-Integration data model within SAP S/4HANA, please consult the relevant blog post.

New Employee Business Partner Data Model in SAP S/4HANA 2020 On-Premise

Target audience: Functional expert, Development Expert

Version: SAP S/4HANA 2020 or higher

 

Prerequisites

Basic configuration of integration scenario

You have done already basic configuration based on
SAP S/4HANA Cookbook - Employee Business Partner Integration as of SAP S/4HANA 2020 with new data model.

 

Setup bgRFC

In addition to the traditional queued Remote Function Call (qRFC), SAP NetWeaver provides the background RFC (bgRFC) to enhance data transfer performance. Typically, bgRFC is utilized for transferring data between systems, such as with the Core Interface (CIF). However, in our scenario, bgRFC is within a single system to expedite processes.

If a bgRFC setup has not been established, you may refer to the first section of the blog post.

Creation of bgRFC and calling in a program

You can check setup at transaction SBGRFCCONF. At my example system, there is already configured a bgRFC Inbound destination.

 

Execution

Run /SHCM/RH_SYNC_BUPA_FROM_EMPL in background

Run report /SHCM/RH_SYNC_BUPA_FROM_EMPL via transaction SE38.

"Personnel Number per batch" is set to 5 due to small number of example data. You should test with 500 or 1000 per batch.

After Execution the system generates bgRFC units based on number of data to be processed and data per batch. You will see following status message.

 

bgRFC Monitor

You can check status of processing by bgRFC Monitor. Start transaction SBGRFCMON and fill selection screen.

After execution, the screen will display active units. Once all data has been processed, they will be removed from the list.

 

Migration log

Migration is logged at application log. You can display application log by running transaction SLGD with
Object: SHCM_EE_INTEGRATION
Subobject: BUPA_SYNC

You will see a screen like this. In best case you will only see green entries 😉

entry.title: Re: I want replication to be created for WT165R CAN SOMEO...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I'd like to ask you to provide some additional information regarding your request, what exactly is your requirement:

  • What replication are you trying to create, what data/content are you trying to replicate?
  • Are you using SAP Central Business Configuration managed system?
  • If it's possible, please attach screenshots of your issue in order to categorize your issue more precisely.

Please update this thread in case your request is still relevant.

 

Best regards,

Tamas

entry.title: Re: Recruiting - Anonymise candidate name and surname
entry.content: Hey, is this still something you are trying to achieve in SAP currently? Our company plugs into your system and enables anonymisation of candidate details until your chosen review point. We integrate with SAP SuccessFactors and I'd be open to discussing the challenges you're facing if this is still a concern?

entry.title: Re: cds-launchpad-plugin supercharged & ready for the future - CAP Plugin, UI5 Tooling support & Asy
entry.content:
I answered myself...

It is possible to inject a custom fioriAppConfig,json configuration via the package,json launchpad configuration (property "appConfigPath"). Very handy 🙂

c.

entry.title: Re: Implementation of Local Extensions for SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing (ICVCP3_EN_Col01)
entry.content:
How to find to course?

For SAP customers: Open https://support.sap.com/en/offerings-programs/enterprise-support/enterprise-support-academy/learn.html and follow the instructions to get access to SAP Learning Hub, edition for SAP Enterprise Support the first time.

Open https://support.sap.com/en/offerings-programs/enterprise-support/enterprise-support-academy/learn.html and enter Implementation of Local Extensions for SAP Variant Configuration and Pricing in the search field and press the Search button:

Learning Hub opens with the search results. But the course is not found:

Clear the Course Level in the Refine By section on the left to remove the pre-selected "Service and Support". Repeat the search to find the course:

entry.title: Run a job with BODS Designer 4.2 SP14
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

On BODS 4.2 SP14 Designer I have a problem when I want to run a job.
- If there is no job running on the repository, you can launch a job
- If a job is already running (launched by me or another person), I get the message "the job server you selected is not working" as well as BODI-1241023 when I go to the designer's job server icon.
But in all cases I can run a job via the console.

I couldn't find any relevant information in the log files.

Can anyone help me?

Regards
Laurent

entry.title: Premium Hub CoE – DSC SAP TM Code for Distance and Duration using HERE Maps
entry.content:
Many times we get this requirement, where Business want TM to Calculate Distance and Duration between different locations.

SAP HANA Spatial Service is recommended approach and you do not have to do any code for same, Details are mentioned in the below link.

Premium Hub CoE – DSC Knowledge Bits – “A simple setup guide to integrate SAP TM with Hana Spatial S...

When customer does not want to use HANA Spatial Service and have HERE api's for Distance and Duration Calculation. 

These are the configuration steps you can use and also added the code which you copy and use it.

In SPRO -> Transportation Management -> Transportation Lane -> Distance and Duration Determination 

Add process Controller Steps

 

 

Code for Process Controller Class 

CLASS zcl_ddd_connector DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.

    TYPES:
      BEGIN OF ty_geo_cord,
        fr_x_pos TYPE c LENGTH 15,
        fr_y_pos TYPE c LENGTH 15,
        to_x_pos TYPE c LENGTH 15,
        to_y_pos TYPE c LENGTH 15,
      END OF ty_geo_cord .
    TYPES ts_geo_cord TYPE ty_geo_cord .

    METHODS get_duration
      IMPORTING
        !io_methpar TYPE REF TO /sctm/cl_meth_parameter
        !it_request TYPE /sctm/tt_request .
    METHODS get_api
      IMPORTING
        !is_geo_cord   TYPE ts_geo_cord
      RETURNING
        VALUE(et_data) TYPE REF TO data .
    METHODS cast_request
      IMPORTING
        !io_request       TYPE REF TO /sctm/cl_request
      RETURNING
        VALUE(ro_request) TYPE REF TO /scmb/cl_ddd_request .
    METHODS convert_seconds_to_duration
      IMPORTING
        !iv_seconds        TYPE int4
      RETURNING
        VALUE(rv_duration) TYPE /sapapo/ts_durat .
    METHODS extract_duration_from_route
      IMPORTING
        !iv_route_duration TYPE int4
      RETURNING
        VALUE(rv_duration) TYPE /sapapo/ts_durat .
  PROTECTED SECTION.
  PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.



CLASS ZCL_DDD_CONNECTOR IMPLEMENTATION.


* <SIGNATURE>---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
* | Instance Public Method ZCL_DDD_CONNECTOR->CAST_REQUEST
* +-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
* | [--->] IO_REQUEST                     TYPE REF TO /SCTM/CL_REQUEST
* | [<-()] RO_REQUEST                     TYPE REF TO /SCMB/CL_DDD_REQUEST
* +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------</SIGNATURE>
  METHOD cast_request.
    TRY.
        ro_request ?= io_request.
      CATCH cx_sy_move_cast_error.
        CLEAR ro_request.
    ENDTRY.
  ENDMETHOD.


* <SIGNATURE>---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
* | Instance Public Method ZCL_DDD_CONNECTOR->CONVERT_SECONDS_TO_DURATION
* +-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
* | [--->] IV_SECONDS                     TYPE        INT4
* | [<-()] RV_DURATION                    TYPE        /SAPAPO/TS_DURAT
* +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------</SIGNATURE>
  method CONVERT_SECONDS_TO_DURATION.
     CONSTANTS: lc_seconds_minute TYPE int1 VALUE 60,
               lc_seconds_hour   TYPE int2 VALUE 3600.

    DATA: hour(4) TYPE c,
          min(2)  TYPE c,
          sec(2)  TYPE c.

    CLEAR rv_duration.

    hour = iv_seconds DIV lc_seconds_hour.
    min = ( iv_seconds MOD lc_seconds_hour ) DIV lc_seconds_minute.
    sec = ( iv_seconds MOD lc_seconds_hour ) MOD lc_seconds_minute.

    rv_duration = hour * 10000 + min * 100 + sec ##NUMBER_OK.
  endmethod.


* <SIGNATURE>---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
* | Instance Public Method ZCL_DDD_CONNECTOR->EXTRACT_DURATION_FROM_ROUTE
* +-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
* | [--->] IV_ROUTE_DURATION              TYPE        INT4
* | [<-()] RV_DURATION                    TYPE        /SAPAPO/TS_DURAT
* +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------</SIGNATURE>
  method EXTRACT_DURATION_FROM_ROUTE.
     DATA: lv_duration_in_seconds TYPE int4.

    CLEAR rv_duration.

    lv_duration_in_seconds = iv_route_duration.
    rv_duration = convert_seconds_to_duration( iv_seconds = lv_duration_in_seconds ).
  endmethod.


* <SIGNATURE>---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
* | Instance Public Method ZCL_DDD_CONNECTOR->GET_API
* +-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
* | [--->] IS_GEO_CORD                    TYPE        TS_GEO_CORD
* | [<-()] ET_DATA                        TYPE REF TO DATA
* +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------</SIGNATURE>
  METHOD get_api.

    DATA: lv_api         TYPE string,
          lv_destination TYPE c VALUE 'HERE_ROUTE_V7' LENGTH 15.

    CONCATENATE '?transportMode=car&origin=' is_geo_cord-fr_y_pos ',' is_geo_cord-fr_x_pos '&destination='
    is_geo_cord-to_y_pos ',' is_geo_cord-to_x_pos '&return=summary' INTO lv_api.

    CALL FUNCTION 'Z_FM_OTC_HERE_MAP_REST_API'
      EXPORTING
        im_destination = lv_destination
        im_api         = lv_api
      IMPORTING
        et_data        = et_data.

  ENDMETHOD.


* <SIGNATURE>---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
* | Instance Public Method ZCL_DDD_CONNECTOR->GET_DURATION
* +-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
* | [--->] IO_METHPAR                     TYPE REF TO /SCTM/CL_METH_PARAMETER
* | [--->] IT_REQUEST                     TYPE        /SCTM/TT_REQUEST
* +--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------</SIGNATURE>
  METHOD get_duration.

*Data Declaration
    DATA: lt_data       TYPE REF TO data,
          ls_geo_cord   TYPE ts_geo_cord,
          lv_dec        TYPE p LENGTH 8 DECIMALS 6,
          lr_data       TYPE REF TO data,
          ls_ddd_result TYPE /scmb/s_ddd_request_result.

    FIELD-SYMBOLS: <data>        TYPE data,
                   <routes>      TYPE any,
                   <sections>    TYPE any,
                   <structure>   TYPE any,
                   <summary>     TYPE any,
                   <table>       TYPE ANY TABLE,
                   <itab>        TYPE ANY TABLE,
                   <isum>        TYPE ANY TABLE,
                   <field>       TYPE any,
                   <field_value> TYPE data.

*Process GeoRouting requests (just a single request object expected here containing all concrete requests)
    LOOP AT it_request INTO DATA(lo_request).

*Cast
      DATA(lo_ddd_request) = cast_request( lo_request ).
      CHECK lo_ddd_request IS NOT INITIAL.

*Fetch geo cordinates
      LOOP AT lo_ddd_request->mt_requests INTO DATA(ls_request).

        IF ls_request-loc_fr_xpos <> ls_request-loc_to_xpos OR
           ls_request-loc_fr_ypos <> ls_request-loc_to_ypos.

          ls_geo_cord-fr_x_pos = ls_request-loc_fr_xpos.
          CONDENSE ls_geo_cord-fr_x_pos.
          CONCATENATE ls_geo_cord-fr_x_pos(2) '.' ls_geo_cord-fr_x_pos+2(6) INTO ls_geo_cord-fr_x_pos.

          ls_geo_cord-fr_y_pos = ls_request-loc_fr_ypos.
          CONDENSE ls_geo_cord-fr_y_pos .
          CONCATENATE ls_geo_cord-fr_y_pos(2) '.' ls_geo_cord-fr_y_pos+2(6) INTO ls_geo_cord-fr_y_pos.

          ls_geo_cord-to_x_pos = ls_request-loc_to_xpos.
          CONDENSE ls_geo_cord-to_x_pos.
          CONCATENATE ls_geo_cord-to_x_pos(2) '.' ls_geo_cord-to_x_pos+2(6) INTO ls_geo_cord-to_x_pos.

          ls_geo_cord-to_y_pos = ls_request-loc_to_ypos..
          CONDENSE ls_geo_cord-to_y_pos.
          CONCATENATE ls_geo_cord-to_y_pos(2) '.' ls_geo_cord-to_y_pos+2(6) INTO ls_geo_cord-to_y_pos.

*Call method for API consumption
          lt_data = get_api( ls_geo_cord ).

*If data exist
          IF lt_data IS BOUND.

*Fetch routes
            ASSIGN lt_data->* TO <data>.
            ASSIGN COMPONENT 'ROUTES' OF STRUCTURE <data> TO <routes>.
            ASSIGN <routes>->* TO <table>.

*Loop Routes data


            LOOP AT <table> ASSIGNING <structure>.

*Fetch Sections
              ASSIGN <structure>->* TO <data>.
              ASSIGN COMPONENT 'SECTIONS' OF STRUCTURE <data> TO <sections>.
              ASSIGN <sections>->* TO <itab>.

*Loop Internal data

*Append Data into Final result table
*            insert INITIAL LINE TO lo_ddd_request->mt_results ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_results>).

**Pass Request data from input to output data " Mandataory to do this
*            LOOP AT ls_request-requests INTO DATA(ls_req).
*              APPEND INITIAL LINE TO <ls_results>-requests ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_req>).
*              MOVE-CORRESPONDING ls_req TO <ls_req>.
*            ENDLOOP.
*
**Precision 2 means Data is coming from 3rd party GIS provider
*            <ls_results>-didu_precision = '2'.
*            <ls_results>-buffered = 'X'.

              LOOP AT <itab> ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ls_sec>).

*Fetch Summary to get distance and duration
                ASSIGN <ls_sec>->* TO <data>.
                ASSIGN COMPONENT 'SUMMARY' OF STRUCTURE <data> TO <summary>.
                ASSIGN <summary>->* TO FIELD-SYMBOL(<wsum>).

*Pass Duration
                TRY.
                    ASSIGN COMPONENT 'DURATION' OF STRUCTURE <wsum> TO <field>.
                    IF <field> IS ASSIGNED.
                      lr_data = <field>.
                      ASSIGN lr_data->* TO <field_value>.

                      ls_ddd_result-duration =  extract_duration_from_route( <field_value> ).

                    ENDIF.
                    UNASSIGN: <field>, <field_value>.

*Pass Distance
                    ASSIGN COMPONENT 'LENGTH' OF STRUCTURE <wsum> TO <field>.
                    IF <field> IS ASSIGNED.
                      lr_data = <field>.
                      ASSIGN lr_data->* TO <field_value>.
*                      ls_ddd_result-distance = ls_ddd_result-distance + ( <field_value> / 1000 ). 
                      ls_ddd_result-distance = ( <field_value> / 1000 ).
                    ENDIF.
                    UNASSIGN: <field>, <field_value>.
                  CATCH cx_sy_itab_line_not_found.
                ENDTRY.

              ENDLOOP.

              IF ls_ddd_result IS NOT INITIAL.
                ls_ddd_result-loc_fr_xpos = ls_request-loc_fr_xpos.
                ls_ddd_result-loc_fr_ypos = ls_request-loc_fr_ypos.
                ls_ddd_result-loc_to_xpos = ls_request-loc_to_xpos.
                ls_ddd_result-loc_to_ypos = ls_request-loc_to_ypos.
                ls_ddd_result-didu_precision = /scmb/if_dist_dur_det=>gc_didu_prec_gis.
                ls_ddd_result-requests    = ls_request-requests.
                INSERT ls_ddd_result INTO TABLE lo_ddd_request->mt_results.
                CLEAR ls_ddd_result.
              ENDIF.
            ENDLOOP.
          ENDIF.
        ELSE.
          ls_ddd_result-duration = 0.
          ls_ddd_result-distance = 0.
          ls_ddd_result-loc_fr_xpos = ls_request-loc_fr_xpos.
          ls_ddd_result-loc_fr_ypos = ls_request-loc_fr_ypos.
          ls_ddd_result-loc_to_xpos = ls_request-loc_to_xpos.
          ls_ddd_result-loc_to_ypos = ls_request-loc_to_ypos.
          ls_ddd_result-didu_precision = /scmb/if_dist_dur_det=>gc_didu_prec_gis.
          ls_ddd_result-requests    = ls_request-requests.
          INSERT ls_ddd_result INTO TABLE lo_ddd_request->mt_results.
          CLEAR ls_ddd_result.
        ENDIF.
      ENDLOOP.
    ENDLOOP.

  ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

 

 

 

Create a Function Module

 

FUNCTION z_fm_here_map_rest_api.
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------
*"*"Local Interface:
*"  IMPORTING
*"     REFERENCE(IM_DESTINATION) TYPE  CHAR15
*"     VALUE(IM_API) TYPE  STRING
*"  EXPORTING
*"     REFERENCE(ET_DATA) TYPE REF TO  DATA
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------

*HTTP Client Abstraction
  DATA: lo_client      TYPE REF TO if_http_client,
        lo_rest_client TYPE REF TO cl_rest_http_client,
        lo_response    TYPE REF TO     if_rest_entity,
        lv_apikey      TYPE string VALUE 'PMHfDS0HDSRRpohXIJ_R4EN9uOGSeCyK2XDrx3VPXHY'.
*        lv_apikey      TYPE string VALUE 'M-AGoC0QrkXBQqmFSnfpbsf14BFVrpmr9UNEKTVFAUQ'." Rohit on 28-08-2022


  CHECK im_api IS NOT INITIAL.

*Concatenate api key and app id for authentication
*  CONCATENATE im_api '&app_id=' lv_app_id '&apiKey=' lv_apikey INTO im_api.
  CONCATENATE im_api '&apiKey=' lv_apikey INTO im_api.

*consume service from RFC Destination
  cl_http_client=>create_by_destination(
   EXPORTING
     destination              = im_destination    " Logical destination (specified in function call)
   IMPORTING
     client                   = lo_client    " HTTP Client Abstraction
   EXCEPTIONS
     argument_not_found       = 1
     destination_not_found    = 2
     destination_no_authority = 3
     plugin_not_active        = 4
     internal_error           = 5
     OTHERS                   = 6 ).

  CHECK lo_client IS BOUND.

  CREATE OBJECT lo_rest_client
    EXPORTING
      io_http_client = lo_client.

*Get data in JSON
  CALL METHOD lo_client->request->set_header_field
    EXPORTING
      name  = 'Accept'
      value = 'application/json'.

*Pass API
  cl_http_utility=>set_request_uri(
      EXPORTING
        request = lo_client->request    " HTTP Framework (iHTTP) HTTP Request
        uri     = im_api                   " URI String (in the Form of /path?query-string)
    ).

*Pass method as GET
  lo_rest_client->if_rest_client~get( ).

  CHECK lo_rest_client IS BOUND.

* HTTP response
  lo_response = lo_rest_client->if_rest_client~get_response_entity( ).

  CHECK lo_response IS BOUND.

* HTTP return status
  DATA(http_status)   = lo_response->get_header_field( '~status_code' ).

*Status code should be success
  CHECK http_status = '200' OR http_status = '201'.

* HTTP JSON return string
  DATA(json_response) = lo_response->get_string_data( ).

  CHECK json_response IS NOT INITIAL.

*Convert JSON into Internal table
  CALL METHOD /ui2/cl_json=>deserialize
    EXPORTING
      json         = json_response
      pretty_name  = /ui2/cl_json=>pretty_mode-user
      assoc_arrays = abap_true
    CHANGING
      data         = et_data.

ENDFUNCTION.

SM59 Remote connection with HERE API

entry.title: Re: The plant discription did not display in MB51 and ME2...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I'd like to ask you to provide some additional information regarding your issue:

  • Are you using SAP Central Business Configuration managed system?
  • If yes, did you maintain Plant description correctly in your CBC project in the Organizational Structure app and then deploy it to your target system? (SAP Help - Setting Up Organizational Structure)
  • Please provide what is the expected value for Plant description that is not reflecting in the apps MB51,ME2L.

Additionally please check below SAP KBA regarding the multi-language organizational units:
3408072 - CBC: How to maintain different organizational unit names for different languages

Please note that in case your issue requires more complex analysis, it is suggested to create a customer ticket on the responsible component for deeper analysis.

 

Best regards,

Tamas

entry.title: Issue with APP F3193 - Pack Outbound Deliveries
entry.content:
Hi all,

There is an issue with APP F3193 in S/4 HANA 2022-02.

When we are using the standard app Pack Outbound Deliveries to Pack items from Source HU on left to Shipping HU on the right side using the Pack button, but the items are not shown in the Shipping HU on the right side.

When the Pack button is clicked items are packed to Shipping HU, but the items are not shown in the UI, we can see the Shipping HU, but not the items which are packed. However, if we check in backend, the items are packed into Shipping HU which are not visible in the Fiori app.

What could be the problem here?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Extract whole text from Document Information extraction
entry.content:
Hi Manuel, 
We only support the JSON output as of now, the easiest solution would be to write a small script that converts the JSON output to pure text.
You can also use the influence program to raise feature requests towards the product: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#campaign/3667

Best regards,
Tobias

entry.title: Re: SAP Variant Configuration alternative bom selection
entry.content: This topic seems Variant Configuration specific, SAP Central Business Configuration tag seems irrelevant, hence contacted moderators to remove the tag.

entry.title: PurReq into PO in MD04. How to make it automatic.
entry.content:
Hi,

When using MD04 to for material and have the PurReq for it when I'm trying to convert it to Purchase Order the next screen is showing empty. To have it filled I need to drag the PurReq into the basket.

Is there any way to make it automated? My colleagues have it set up but I cannot find a way how to do that. Can you please help me?

Thanks

Tom

entry.title: Overall cash Position check - Cash flow Analyzer App - Local Currency mismatch
entry.content:
Transaction code FS10N -GL ACCOUNT balance as on 31.12.2023 (USD Currency)

Cash flow Analyser App(GL Account 11290) USD currency balance is matching with FS10N

Transaction code FS10N -GL ACCOUNT balance as on 31.12.2023 (BHD Currency)

 

Cash flow Analyser App (GL Account11290)  BHD currency balance is matching with FS10N

When execute Cashflow fiori app for overall the GL Accounts in BHD Local currency system is not displaying the proper balances.

FIN Cash Management #CashManagement

entry.title: Re: Guided Sourcing - Adoption Best Practice
entry.content: The area that I am still unclear on is the transition between the two. If a users has started on a Classic template what issues does that cause in Guided especially once Classic is switched off? SAP Ariba Sourcing

entry.title: I would like to print a PDF document in landscape format
entry.content:
We have 6000 Document in our SAP Content Server. I would like to print a PDF document in landscape format (DINA4).

The Document are stored in landscape format. When I print this File over the ADS to the Printer, then the Printer print it portrait format and the data on the right is cut off.

I print the PDF Files with the same Function as here (My first Step is to checkout the Document from the Content Server, that works).

http://scn.sap.com/thread/2114729

I check the Report and the Class/Interface (we use SAP_BASIS 750)

The Report RSPO_TEST_MERGE_PDF_FILES has no option to rotate the Document, and the class CL_RSPO_PDF_MERGE has no option to rotate.

How can I rotate the Document? Or witch is the right setting to print this Documents in landscape format?

Thanks

entry.title: Embedded TM / Seafreight Booking question
entry.content:
Dear community,

I hope you can help me with some basic understanding for sea freight bookings in SAP TM (embedded TM).

I create a sea booking for a freight unit of 10 tons. Now let's say I want to split it to each 5 tons because I need to load 5 tons per container. I know I could create a better freight unit building rule, but sometimes it can happen that we need to split quantities on different containers.

Question 1: can I do the split directly in the freight booking? I don't see a possibility on the UI. So for now, I jump into the freight unit and do the split there, but the newly created freight unit is not assigned any more to the freight booking. So I think, this is not the standard process. Any ideas?

Question 2: After I have created the containers and assigned the freight units, I create the pick-up order for each container. So in my case, I get 2 freight orders. That's fine. Now I want to create for each freight order a delivery. But when I start the delivery proposal in TM Cockpit, the system combines both freight units in one delivery. I need one delivery per freight order. The same delivery profile is assigned to the freight order type as well as to the sea booking type. What do I oversee here?

 

Thanks a lot for your support!

entry.title: Email notification to Ariba Supplier after the payment of Invoice in S4HANA
entry.content:
I wanted to understand if an email notification can be triggered to the Ariba Supplier after the payment is processed in S4HANA.

Ariba (Invoice)-->S4H(Invoice Processed)--> Email notification to Supplier 

SAP Ariba Procurement, cloud edition SAP Ariba Sourcing

entry.title: Re: SAP IBP Formula similar to excel CEILING function
entry.content:
Hi @AndreiLupu,

I derived the below procedure and it works well for me. 

=IF(ATTR_B = 0, KF_A, IF(KF_A/ATTR_B > 0, ROUNDUP(KF_A/ATTR_B ,0), ROUNDDOWN(KF_A/ATTR_B ,0)) * ATTR_B)

Try at your side and let me know

Best Regards,

Riyaz

entry.title: Reflections on Our Recent Feedback Session for Speaker Training
entry.content:
Hey Community,

We just finished our latest feedback session for our speaker training. It was inspiring! Watching our members grow and refine their presentation skills is rewarding. The feedback shared during these sessions helps us become more confident and effective communicators.

Let's discuss a bit: What aspects of presentation styles are most important to you when giving or receiving feedback? What parts of speaking in front of an audience do you find hardest?

Here are a few things to think about when giving and getting feedback:

Give both positive and constructive feedback. This encourages growth and motivation.

Be empathetic and encouraging. Understand that public speaking can be daunting. Deliver your feedback with empathy, emphasizing that everyone is on a learning journey. Constructive criticism should feel like guidance, not judgment.

Encourage practice and persistence. Remind each other that improvement comes with practice. Encourage consistent effort and provide opportunities for members to present regularly in a supportive environment.

We want to hear your thoughts and experiences! Share your tips, challenges, and advice for giving and receiving feedback on presentation styles.

Let's support each other in becoming more powerful voices in the tech industry! 😊

entry.title: Unable to change font color of sub report data based on conditions
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have one sub report added in group footer section. I want to change the font color of sub report data based on row header. 

Note I have created group based on row header 

I have wrote below formula but it's not working 

If  groupName  ({reportname.rowheader}) <> "amount" then crWhite else crBlack

Is the formula correct ? 

Thanks in advanced

entry.title: How to get the data for SAP Business ByDesign report aging list of debtors using SOAP API connection
entry.content:
I have a issue where we are using a SAP product Business ByDesign. We want to build a aged debtors report. This should be done through our Datawarehouse that is our central source of truth. We are using SOAP API connection from SAP to pull through invoices to our DWH for billings dashboard. Now for building aged debtor I know SAP has aging list of receivables but I want that data into our datawarehouse I am not sure how can I proceed with that. I am not aware of SOAP API endpoints which I can use to get required data to the DWH. Can anybody help me on that?

I have tried searching the portal and SOAP api documentation to connect SAP, but i didnot find complete information anywhere. I am a bit lost.

entry.title: Re: Tricentis Test Automation for SAP integrated with SAP Cloud ALM is now available
entry.content:
Hi @Nicolas_Alech,

Thank you for the blog. It's very informative.

I do have one question though  , Could you please explain more about the Tricentics TTA testcase execution in virtual machine. How to connect to virtual machine ? How the agents work virtually

 

Thanks

Reshma V

entry.title: Re: I would like to print a PDF document in landscape format
entry.content: What did you find in the SAP notes? (search "ADS orientation", should be sufficient) You can understand that the orientation depends on the ADS configuration XML file for the type of the printer you use (the printer language like PCL, PS, ZPL, etc.) because PDF must be converted when it's printed (unless the printer supports the PDF language, it's not frequent if I'm not wrong).

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for group reporting: tighter accounting integration with Group Reporting Preparation
entry.content:
Hi @Robert_Jan_Bron,

yes, the option 1 is freezing the data for periods 1-3 as is, if you really want to start using GRPL functionality only from period 4.

In your case I would suggest to set the 'From Year for Preparation Ledger' to 2025 and use the BCF to initiliaze the data (incl. GR fields) in period 0.

Kind regards,
Tomas

entry.title: Re: How to Generate and Download PDFs on the fly without persisting in CAP Application(Node.js)
entry.content: Very good information 👏🏻👏🏻👏🏻

entry.title: What are PFTR and HRS1220?
entry.content:
Hello,

out of curiosity, a colleague of mine mentioned the transaction code PFTR. I checked in my system and in the Web what it is, I see that it takes the possible transaction codes from the table HRS1220, but it's empty in my system.

The only topic I could find in the Web, but it just says PFTR without explanation: Solved: Task definition with Transactioncode ? - SAP Community

My question is how to use, implement and test it?

Thanks.

Sandra

entry.title: Re: Aggregation in CDS Custom entity display in RAP
entry.content:
Hi Wolfgang ,

thank you for your reply .

sorry for typo error of Annotations.  Yes that annotation works with normal CDS , however i have the custom entity .
i am looking for any other way to have aggregation applicable for Custom entity .

entry.title: Re: Enabling the CFL custom fields with F4 help using SCFD_EUI transaction from SAP GUI
entry.content:
Great blog post...!

One question: I cannot activate the 2 CDS views since view A references view B and vice versa. Even if I activate them together, the conflict cannot be resolved.

I was also surprised that I had to copy the generated code manually into the ADT. DId I miss something?

entry.title: Re: How To Upload Data to a Public or Private Planning Version Using a File Upload Custom Widget Wi
entry.content: Hi @gerd_schoeffl, Thanks. For the import I understood, but @thayumanavan gave the good hint, that 2 models could be used. One for importing into a flat list and after that using cross model copying.

entry.title: Bem vindo ao grupo da Comunidade SAP do PORTO (Portugal)
entry.content:
Este espaço foi criado para reunir profissionais, entusiastas e empresas que utilizam o SAP, promovendo um ambiente de troca de conhecimentos e experiências. Nosso objetivo é fortalecer a rede de contatos entre os membros da comunidade, facilitar o acesso a informações relevantes e atualizações sobre o SAP, e destacar as iniciativas e histórias de sucesso locais.

O Porto, uma das cidades mais bonitas de Portugal, oferece uma experiência única que combina história, cultura, gastronomia e belezas naturais. Situa-se na região Norte de Portugal. Aqui estão algumas razões pelas quais você deve visitar o Porto:

  • Centro Histórico: A Ribeira, classificada como Patrimônio Mundial pela UNESCO, encanta com suas ruas estreitas, casas coloridas e igrejas barrocas.
  • Livraria Lello: Considerada uma das mais bonitas do mundo, é um verdadeiro paraíso para os amantes de livros e de arquitetura.
  • Vinho do Porto: Desfrute de degustações em caves tradicionais ao longo do rio Douro. Uma experiência imperdível para os apreciadores de vinhos.
  • Culinária Local: Delicie-se com pratos típicos como a francesinha, bacalhau à Gomes de Sá e os tradicionais petiscos em tascas locais.
  • Rio Douro: Aproveite um passeio de barco pelo rio Douro, oferecendo vistas deslumbrantes das margens e das vinhas.
  • Jardins e Parques: Explore o Parque da Cidade e os jardins do Palácio de Cristal, perfeitos para momentos de relaxamento e piqueniques.
  • Pontes Icônicas: Admire a Ponte Dom Luís I, projetada por um discípulo de Gustave Eiffel, uma maravilha da engenharia e um símbolo da cidade.
  • Museus e Galerias: Visite o Museu de Arte Contemporânea de Serralves e a Casa da Música para uma imersão no mundo da arte e da música.
  • Pessoas Acolhedoras: Os portuenses são conhecidos por sua simpatia e hospitalidade, fazendo você se sentir em casa desde o primeiro momento.
  • Ambiente Vibrante: A cidade oferece uma mistura única de tradição e modernidade, com uma vida noturna animada, festivais e eventos culturais.

Não faltam motivos para se associar a este grupo, participar dos nossos eventos no PORTO e conhecer esta cidade cosmopolita.

Neste blog, você encontrará uma variedade de conteúdos, desde artigos técnicos e tutoriais até notícias sobre eventos e formações. Queremos que este seja um ponto de encontro virtual onde todos possam aprender, compartilhar e crescer juntos.

Junte-se a nós e descubra como a Comunidade SAP PORTO pode ajudar-te a alcançar novos patamares na tua carreira e em teus projetos!

entry.title: Re: Export data in ANSI format using GUI_DOWNLOAD
entry.content: Hi, Did you get any solution ? I am also facing the same issue.

entry.title: Re: SCN Points or Karma Credits
entry.content: It was in the old Community platform, why do you need that? Explanations: https://community.sap.com/t5/what-s-new/let-the-gamification-begin/ba-p/311892

entry.title: Success Factors Recruitment - Testing of candidates
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I have a question regarding Recruitment module in Success Factors.

Requirement is that at some point candidate get tests to be completed, they can be internal or leading to external source, like web site with test questions and tasks.

I am aware of question library and questions added when creating a requisition, but that is not what works in this case.

Thanks,

My Most Hilarious Coding Failure

entry.title: Re: OOABAP
entry.content: Yeah with 'Static Constructor' I meant CLASS_CONSTRUCTOR only, just aligned the name as per Standard SAP document 🙂

entry.title: SAP Inside Track PORTO 2024
entry.content:
SAP Inside Track PORTO will have it first edition in PORTO (Portugal) on September 28, 2024.

Look here in the SAP Community Event Calendar.

The event is present in several countries around the world. Its organizers are active members of the SAP Community to share knowledge and strengthen professionals among the participants.

The event has been in existence for over 15 years and has been held in several cities around the world.

Learn more about how to hold your SAP Inside Track event in your city through this LINK.

Inscription:

Includes:

  • Access to the event;
  • Access to all the lectures;
  • Candidates can be received to participate as a volunteers of the event;
  • Admissions to the event, here in the Link

entry.content: I was too fast. It's working now!

entry.title: Re: Asset transfer ABUMN - partial transfer of wrongly ad...
entry.content:
Dear @beam_liang @SAPSupport 

Related to my question below, would it be possible to use manual posting to do this transfer ?

Thanks for your reply.

entry.title: Crystal Reports 2020 VS2019 Windows Server 2022 IIS
entry.content:
Hello, I have a Windows Server 2022 running IIS, Crystal Reports 2020, VS2019.

I am publishing some Crystal Reports and I getting the a blank screen with 
TypeError: bobj.isObject is not a function error 

I have DotNet 4.8 and CR Runtime 34 64bit installed

My Web.Config

<configuration>
<system.webServer>
<handlers>
<add name="CrystalImageHandler.aspx_GET"
verb="GET" path="CrystalImageHandler.aspx"
type="CrystalDecisions.Web.CrystalImageHandler, CrystalDecisions.Web, Version=13.0.4000.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=692fbea5521e1304"
preCondition="integratedMode"/>
</handlers>
<validation validateIntegratedModeConfiguration="false" />
</system.webServer>
<system.web>
<compilation debug="false" strict="false" explicit="true">
<assemblies>
<add assembly="CrystalDecisions.Web, Version=13.0.4000.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=692FBEA5521E1304"/>
<add assembly="CrystalDecisions.Shared, Version=13.0.4000.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=692FBEA5521E1304"/>
<add assembly="CrystalDecisions.ReportSource, Version=13.0.4000.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=692FBEA5521E1304"/>
<add assembly="CrystalDecisions.CrystalReports.Engine, Version=13.0.4000.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=692FBEA5521E1304"/>

 

 

 Any help will be very much appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Error with webdynpro \CLASS=CL_WD_MATRIX_HEAD_DATA an...
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

I am facing the same issue ... any solution for this ¿?

Thank you in advance.

Rubén.

entry.title: Re: Processing 944 IDOCs with multiple error lines
entry.content: If you are referring to IDoc WMMBXY for inbound goods movement posting it does in fact attempt to process all lines for goods movement in one LUW. However, it does not give a list of errors because the function is interrupted on the first error as is standard behavior in SAP (and should be). It is up to the sender to provide proper data that can be translated accordingly and posted to the system accurately.

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 1 - Setup
entry.content:
Hi,

Here is my submission

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to set filter values using URL Paramet...
entry.content:
Thank you for the suggestion.  This works as expected for single-value parameters. Is there a way also to pass operators such as less than or greater than?

Also, if a date range needs to be set, what format should be followed?
I tried a couple of different formats and the application always took the first date and ignores the second date. So it becomes for example, 01.01.2020 - 01.01.2020 instead of 01.01.2020 - 31.12.2020

entry.title: Re: Use Persona Flavor for SQ01 for Fiori
entry.content:
Hi, 

make sure the following is in configuration of slipstream navigation plugin:

ICF Path: /sap/bc/se/m/script/sap/se/shell/plugins/navigation
SAP UI5 Component ID: sap.se.shell.plugins.navigation

Best Regards!

entry.title: Re: How to get the Access key & Secret key for AWS to cre...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

There is a new URL, so please refer to this one https://youtu.be/6I07Q32Mfj8 

For more information, see also https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/cloud-appliance-library

Best regards,

Tsvetinka

entry.title: Re: SAP Process Intelligence Imports not separating Activ...
entry.content:
Hi CLThomas, 

thank you for reaching out with this issue regarding importing into SAP Signavio Process Intelligence. Unfortunately this specific case has to be investigated further to see if there is an issue with the csv file you created or if the system is not behaving as expected. 

We thus kindly ask you to create a support ticket via SAP For Me!

Thank you!

Windows will default to a zoom size of 150% for a lot of users - is this a problem for recording projects?

Thanks,

Andrew

S100Coffee PowerGms1051520

entry.title: Re: How to Use 'document-service' API to Upload Documents into Sales & Service Cloud Version 2
entry.content: @Saurabh_Kabra : As of now, it is a multistep process whether you do it manually or programmatically.

entry.title: Re: The limit of parallel sessions is reached ADT
entry.content:
After you complete your debugging session, in the debug panel you will get an option called Terminated. Try to right click and select Terminate/Disconnect All. That might work.

Thanks and Regards,

Pannaga Hegde

entry.title: Re: The RFC does not receive the values passed in when ca...
entry.content: Thank you very much, Thomas.

entry.title: Re: Project Cost Prediction
entry.content:
Hi Support,

While I tried to run the prediction, error below shows. 
We successfully run the "Predict Cost" before but seems it does not work now. 

Any idea what should I check to fix this issue?

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA for group reporting: tighter accounting integration with Group Reporting Preparation
entry.content:
Hi @tomasoldrich , 

Downside of that is that the annual corrections (accountant corrections) in period 13-16 are still released to period 12 in fiscal year 2024. That is not favourable, as period 12 was already reported to a shareholder. I will try to solve that useing a restatement version. 

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud for Utilities foundation, or the Measurement Concept Management
entry.content:
Hi @JelisavetaN ,

Thanks for your great blog post!

I have a question about MCM together with Event Mesh / EMIS and Event broker.

- We have the licence for MCM on Subaccount1. We do NOT have a licence for the integration suite (and therefore no advanced EM). The 'old' Event Mesh service is not available anymore. Also, the Event broker service is not available on this subaccount.

- On Subaccount2 we subscribed to the old version of SAP event mesh, which is up and running.

 

My questions are:

For a non-productive purpose, would you recommend using the old EM service?

If you don't have the old EM available or if setup new and used productive  - is the only option to buy both MCM and Integration Suite (including advanced Event Mesh)

Best regards

Till

entry.title: SAC Validation Rules should be checked while running Data Actions
entry.content:
Hi All,

in my model I set one Validation Rule (I'm currently using the one with Existing Attributes) to allow data changes only for certain combinations of CCs and KFs.

What I found is that Validation rules are checked only for Manual Input or while trying to publish some data. But What about Data actions? For instance, if a run a Data Action with an Allocation step, I was expecting that my amount would be distributed only on the allowed combinations. But it is allocating for all the combinations. Only when I publish allocated numbers, data on not allowed combinations are not published: but total amount won't be my initial aggregated numbers that I need to allocate.

Any solution for my problem?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Trigger creation of delivery documents in SAP TM
entry.content:
Is it possible that TM does not combine deliveries for planned freight units?

I have a seafreight booking. I split the quantity into 2 containers. For each container I create a pick-up freight order. Now I need for each freight order a single delivery, but the delivery proposal combines them into one delivery (with 2 items). 

 

 

Thanks for your support!

entry.title: Re: SAP Data Warehouse Cloud - Can't load Data from Spaces
entry.content:
Hello there , what was the conclusion?

We are receiving this in our Datasphere systems after upgrade.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud Planning - Validation Rules
entry.content:
Hi Gajendra,

Thanks for sharing the post. Very Interesting.

I have noticed that validation rules are checked only with manual input or while trying to publish data. But what about Data Actions results? Why Validation rules are not checked during Data Action calculations? Am I missing any settings?

I tried with a simple copy step - it is copying everything.

I tried with an Allocation step - it is allocating also on not allowed combinations. Even if when I copy only data on allowed combinations are published, my total allocated amount is not the one desired.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi Mike, @pokrakam ,

Yes, this is a good spot. We will sync RZ10 to the profile.

But as you say: In the next version.

Thanks and best wishes,

Julie.

entry.title: Re: Shared contract
entry.content: Hi Eric! contract 27 and 26 linked to the contract 20 (where the shared allowance was created) Activating the contract 27 the logic is running with data belonged to the contract 26. I used the No Access component to "debug" the recurring rate execution to understand what was doing wrong...

entry.title: Can't load Data from Spaces - System down
entry.content:
Hello all, 

Are we the only ones reciving issues like "spaces couldn’t be loaded" since last system refresh  ( 16th Sun 24) ?

We can not reach the system / find view files or do any intervention.

entry.title: Call API on Presentation Server using CL_HTTP_CLIENT
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there the possibility of consuming an API exposed on my local machine (Presentation Server) using the CL_HTTP_CLIENT class (or another method if it exists)?
SAP is accessed using SAP Gui, and the connection can be made with SAP Router or not. Due to this, there is a possibility that my machine is not on the same network that Application Server, which I imagine rules out the possibility of direct access via IP.
The exposed API communicates with local devices (USB), which makes it impossible for the API to be placed on a server.
Each user will access SAP from their own machine, and the API will be exposed on each of them.

Regards,
Miguel Motta

entry.title: Re: add/ read attachments of freight order
entry.content: That's what we are doing but it's a complicated and time-consuming process so I hoped for specific hints or even code-snippets...

entry.title: Re: Is webdynpro application development outdated?
entry.content:
It seems that WBD will continue with us for a long time.

Please join us on the topic of the WEBD future...

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-architecture-discussions/webdynpro-what-is-the-future-of-the-product/m-p/13735302#M413

entry.title: Re: SAP Stammtisch Hannover - Format
entry.content: Wir arbeiten dran und sehen zu, dass die Infos hier irgendwo ersichtlich werden.

entry.title: Re: Call API on Presentation Server using CL_HTTP_CLIENT
entry.content:
Via CL_HTTP_CLIENT, if you use the RFC connection "SAPHTTP", it will access the Web through the HTTP interface on the user's laptop (through the SAP GUI "saphttp" program), as opposed to "SAPHTTPA" which corresponds to the HTTP interface on the ABAP server.

RFC connection "SAPHTTP" (SM59):

SAPHTTPA:

entry.title: Re: With SAP Quartz Dark Theme when I open a Message in B...
entry.content:
Hello,
this is an application issue.

The general topic is explained in SAP Note
2930005 - Quartz Dark: Text in HTML Control is displayed with black font on dark gray background
And this note links to the note for SBWP as well: 2950674

Best regards,
Frank

entry.title: Mass update
entry.content:
Dear all,

Could you please help with the materials mass update (ERP/WP1) in the classification tab (recommend storage statement field)?

I don't have a template available for the LSMW transaction.

Do you know where I can find them?

Many thanks,

Bárbara

entry.title: SAP Crypto DLL filling disk space
entry.content:
Hi, 

We have recently upgraded to SAP B1 FP2405. 

Now we find that a certain directory is being filled every 30secs with a DLL file from SAP. It's chewed up 150GB+ in a few days. 

What could be causing this?

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI options configuration file editable versus re...
entry.content:
Hello Sandra,

unfortunately, you cut off the screenshots.
These files are read-only for example if you define the SAP UI Landscape file via an environment variable.
If you set for example:
set SAPLOGON_LSXML_FILE=C:\Users\<User Name>\AppData\Roaming\SAP\Common\SAPUILandscape.xml
SAP Logon will consider this the central landscape file and disable the respective fields.

So, I would check the environment variables.

Best regards,
Frank

entry.title: Re: add/ read attachments of freight order
entry.content: And in the other tables (TOA01, etc.)

entry.title: Re: Message "'UI Update' has encountered a problem." appears often while debugging in ADT
entry.content: We strongly recommend to not use DevStyle / Darkest Dark Theme together with ADT, as the way how it works is very invasive and we cannot guarantee the functionality in combination with ADT. Can you please try to reproduce the issue using an installation without DevStyle?

entry.title: Re: Secure your LLM: Consuming SAP Generative AI deployments in a Simple Python App
entry.content:
Hi,  Yes you can add authentication to this.

You need to add a uaa service and an app router.

The code also needs to be tweaked inspired by:

https://github.com/gradio-app/gradio/issues/2790

I have a version of that running, drop me an internal email and I will share.  I've not had a chance to tidy it up for public consumption.

entry.title: Re: All permission removed after adding common super doma...
entry.content:
Hello,

we also experienced this behavior with the new RBP Ui but when changing permissions in general not necessarily in regards to common super domain. Also we experienced that the changed permissions were shown as saved but did not reflect in the respective portlet. When changing to the old Ui the permissions were not saved, as previously shown in the new UI. It seams to be a bug with the new Ui.

entry.title: Re: Can we automate SAP GUI MRS Planning board Gantt Chat...
entry.content:
Hi,

the netchart and barchart controls in SAP GUI for Windows only have a quite small scripting API.
See:
https://help.sap.com/docs/sap_gui_for_windows/b47d018c3b9b45e897faf66a6c0885a8/641f6b2c44164366ad580e4e196b7225.html
https://help.sap.com/docs/sap_gui_for_windows/b47d018c3b9b45e897faf66a6c0885a8/d47a106b196445248fee853dfed41dab.html

I doubt that a useful test can be implemented based on this, but you can try.
And there is no other tool that could help you, because every automation tool would need the scripting API to interact with these components.

Best regards,
Frank

entry.title: Re: APIs for VTBSTC1 (Standing Instructions Payment Details), VTBSTA1 (SI Assignments), VTBSTA2 (SI
entry.content:
I have found this thread while looking to sync HR-Data to BP.

We are able to create a BP with vendor-role from HR automatically.

Now we want to create the customer-role.

In ERP we did this by using CALL METHOD cmd_ei_api=>maintain_bapi

I have found the cvi_ei_adapter=>start_inbound_main_single but have no idea how to fill the importstructures to get the customer-role stored correctly.

Can somebody provide help?

with best regards and thank you in advance

Tim Brandes

entry.title: SAP Inside Track PORTO 2024
entry.content:
SAP Inside Track PORTO will have it first edition in PORTO (Portugal) on September 28, 2024.

Look here in the SAP Community Event Calendar.

The event is present in several countries around the world. Its organizers are active members of the SAP Community with the aim of sharing knowledge and strengthening professionals among the participants.

The event has been in existence for over 15 years and has been held in several cities around the world.

Learn more about how to hold your SAP Inside Track event in your city through this LINK.

Inscription:

Includes:

  • Access to the event;
  • Access to all the lectures;
  • Candidates can be received to participate as a volunteer of the event;
  • Admissions to the event, here in the Link 

 

Speaker:

Take this opportunity to share your knowledge and help us make this event even better.

Applications for lectures can be made at this LINK

    • A proposal with the title theme and a synopsis should be sent with the subject SITPOR
    • The lecture time is a maximum of 40 minutes.
    • The last day for submitting proposals is  Aug  25, 2024.
    • Wait for the contact of our team until Aug 30 with confirmation.

Event’s place

The Lodge Hotel

Rua Serpa Pinto, 60 - 4400-307 V. N. Gaia – Porto

On September 28 2024  (Saturday)

 

Agenda

8 am – Reception

9 am to 12 pm – Presentations / lectures

12h to 13:30 – Lunch

14h to 17:30 – Lectures

17:30 to 18:00 – Closing session

Speakers:

Lecture NameSpeaker
SAP Project: Technology or business?António Andrade
SAP Build Work Zone Content Federation deep diveFabio Pagoti
Global eCompliance with SAP Document and Reporting ComplianceFelipe Borges
SAP Implementation Change Management how to manage organizations and peopleMarta Mota
SAP in Industry 4.0Tiago Fernandes
Gen AIBruno Costa
The era of Digitalization and SustainabilityFilipe Silva
SAP IS RetailAndré Margi

 

Organization Team

entry.title: Re: Total Cost Commitment in CN41N report
entry.content:
Hi @Shahzad_Ahmed 

Do the G/L accounts used in the purchase document have a cost element? Did they exist before the creation of the purchase document?

Try executing the CJEN transaction to restructure the RPSCO table of the project.

Regards,
Marcio Blos

entry.title: Re: ClientId of Document Extraction inside SAP Process Automation
entry.content: After a lot of googling the answer from @sabarna17 worked for me. Thanks!!!

entry.title: Re: A cycle is found in the calculation chain of the key...
entry.content:
Hi @AndreiLupu 

I tried to simplify your calculation to avoid the cycles as much as possible not only in IBP, but also in Excel. I think there is a flaw in the way you presumed the calculation of KF2 and KF3 as they overlap each other in the future. Hence the calculation will stop either at KF2 or KF3. We simply can't get rid of this overlapping error. 

Can you re-validate your solution once again? 

Best Regards,

Riyaz

entry.title: Re: Recalculate depreciation S/4 Hana Cloud public
entry.content: Hi Mark, I have the same issue and then I followd your guidance but it's still not calculating depreciation for 12/2024 period.

entry.title: Re: SAP Group Reporting - Different Consolidation Methods...
entry.content:
Big Thanks Florian_Roll. I agree on your recommendations.

For the option to create a different Consolidation Group but a different version needs to be use for Statutory and Management Consolidation, reason is for Management Consolidation although they will be using Proportionate Method but they want to have the flexibility the change Ownership Rate not the same as what they maintain for the Statutory Consolidation.

For example if in Statutory Consolidation Conso Unit A is 80% ownership, but for Management Conso Unit A will be 100% ownership.

entry.title: Re: Schedule recurring processes on discrete dates, if no...
entry.content:
Hi @vincentverheyen ,

Recurring Process in meant for scheduled in terms of a specific periodicity. Ideally IBP's Process Management Feature supports Process Schedule for Recurring and One-Time Processes.

If you're sure about the discrete days in which you want the process to be scheduled, then schedule them as one-time process for those discrete days. 

Best Regards,

Riyaz

entry.title: Curriculum with item completion and retraining
entry.content:
Dear Team,

Need support

Suppose we have a curricula with 2 items.. say Item A and Item B. Item A should be completed by users immediately and Item B should be completed every 2 years. 

Scenario is if users forgets to complete item B within the 2 years time, then they have to retake the item A followed by Item B

 

Difficulties faced : As users might have completed item A earlier, so system is not recognising the above scenarios. 

Thank you. 

SAP SuccessFactors Learning

entry.title: Re: Incoming payment from a multi-currencues BP
entry.content: thanks for the help narayanis. this will help when the open documents was in the same currency I guess. but if the open documents was in usd, egy, euro .. the total amount in the payment means will be calculated based on which exchange currency ? usd, eurp ??

entry.title: Re: Truck is stuck at the gate for 1 hour
entry.content: @Tomas_Buryanek, wished to react a burst out laugh to your meme. But commenting here: 🤣🤣

entry.title: Re: Change Homepage on SAP Power Apps
entry.content: Did you get the answer to this as also trying to change the home page.

entry.title: Solman user SM<SID> is running SAPLSU_USER_CHANGE_DOC in sattelite system
entry.content:
Let the quest begin

In our Fiori system We have a dump every one hour with the program SAPLSU_USER_CHANGE_DOC started by the solman user SM_<SID>

One thing is that the report ends with a "TIME_OUT" dump, we can proberly solve that with archiving and/or extending the "maxruntime" param,

Question:
Can you tell me from where in Solman this is trikkered?

entry.title: Re: Object Page in Fiori List Report is blank (Column hea...
entry.content: of course, the annotation you have is not for rendering object page. you need facet annotation https://github.com/SAP-samples/abap-platform-rap100/blob/main/src/zrap100_c_traveltp_sol.ddlx.asddlxs

entry.title: How to set Bank Account ID?
entry.content:
How to set Bank Account ID using the API Journal Entry - Post (Synchronous)?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Change Homepage on SAP Power Apps
entry.content: I have actually figured it out. Within the App, select the "Navigation" option along the top and change the home screen within there.

entry.title: Re: How to set Bank Account ID?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community, 

 

As of now, the API mentioned does not support setting the Bank Account ID, therefore, a Feature Request would be required.

In order to create a feature request please follow the steps below:

 

  1. Get started by opening SAP Customer Influence.
  2. Register and accept the Terms of Use.
  3. Choose a session of your interest.
  4. Create and submit your improvement request.
  5. Take a look at existing improvement requests and start voting and commenting.

 

You can also refer to below KBA for details:

2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product

 

I hope this helps!

 

Best Regards,

SAP Product Support

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP external ODATA which does not support skip
entry.content: did you try removing the skip by implementing a "before" handler?

entry.title: Re: Re-approve for approved maintenance order
entry.content: Tim, Thanks for your answer. Could you please elaborate how a 2nd approval can be triggered ? Baseline costs are not available in Display Maintenance Order application and can only be traced from Maintenance costs report, so might not solve the problem we are facing
